Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1000 "INVASION-0800-1000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $0800 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Invasion (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $0800 to copy the colour RAM data from $8400 (where it was present in the original game) and display the loading screen. It then waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game. Once displayed, it turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts to allow the game to start correctly.
